title: 今回だけはどうしても

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A philosopher in the Middle Ages once said:

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
"Do not be led astray by the voices of those
around you. Do not identify yourself with idols as
you advance."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: "Do not identify with idols..."

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... I wanted to talk with you about the
autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the number of slots, it seems like the
girl who won the NHK Mile Cup won't be able to
run...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Don't let it faze you. It matters little
who runs or who doesn't.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I will be the lead at the autumn Tenno Sho! I will be the antagonist and the director! And you will also be present!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Which is to say... she always has next year.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall not be disturbed by any turn of events. I
shall simply continue down the path of the
Overlord! For this is the Twinkle Series, and it
affords no other means by which I may claim my
throne!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
News of the racer in question makes its way to
Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So... this is how it is. After she worked so hard in
the Kobe Shimbun Hai too...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She couldn't make it... even though she tried her
hardest...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This sucks... This is the worst I've felt since I
debuted...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never had to deal with anything like this before I
began running myself... I could just innocently
simp...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I lived as if I was in a dream watching
Umamusume happily run through paradise...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never knew that the tears of those angels
amassed beneath the sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And now it's come to this... I can't have my chance
to shine without stealing someone else's.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The dead end of a dead end! How am I expected
to go into the autumn Tenno Sho feeling like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I should have just never debuted at all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I'd just kept waffling between turf and dirt
forever, this never would've happened! Never...
choice_data_list:
None of the good things would have happened
either, though. Right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Do you really think you were better off
ignorant?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I... No... I wasn't... Of course I wasn't.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I discovered the extraordinary thing Umamusume
clasp onto at the end of their struggles.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Winning and losing... That's what racing is all
about. And if there are winners, there have to be
losers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Someone always walks away sad no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But that regret turns into motivation for
tomorrow! I didn't know it before, but now I've
experienced it firsthand!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can say from the bottom of my heart
that all the Umamusume in the Twinkle Series are
amazing! I love them all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: They stay persistent, beaming as they burst through every obstacle no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's why I will do it too one day! AND SHE WILL TOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her outburst, Agnes Digital suddenly comes
to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She'll definitely... do it too... What happened this
time isn't about winning or losing, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's more like... overcoming hardship? If that
determination is what makes Umamusume so
precious...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Then she'll probably overcome this too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Maybe one day she'll realize that this is just
another test that will make her stronger.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You... really think so? I feel like... if she can do it,
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then so can I. I'm Agnes Digital the All-Rounder,
and I'm gonna run in every race I possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the determination King taught me and
use it to pass forth the torch of courage, just like
I swore I would!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I have to give that Horsegirl inspiration. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll race in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not just gonna run! That's definitely not
enough!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win so spectacularly that she won't
have a single regret about missing it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want it to be so great that it makes her want to
run there next year. Like sooo well that it'll drive
her to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely do it! Definitely, definitely, definitely!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's my responsibility if I'm going to run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital sets her resolve for the coming
race. However, T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto
won't be easy opponents.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Long, long ago, a wise philosopher once said...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: "Don't be led astray by the crowd. And especially don't spend so long in it that you can't move past it."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but identify with them! I feel their
emotions as if they were my own and weep!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's what I do! That's how deep my love for
Umamusume runs!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't go forward pretending like there aren't
any Umas feeling disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I'll take their sadness as my own and
carry it into all the races I run. Their tears will be
my power.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And even if it's not enough, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the feelings of every Umamusume that
I've come across and throw it all at the Overlord
and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her love for Umamusume is her strength. The
grief she carried just moments ago has become
her secret weapon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We need to use this drive to keep chasing the two
peaks looming ahead of us until the day of the
race.
